source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for monitoring dashboards with Noto Sans guidance for Japanese labels, tabular sensor numerals, and compact status tables.
layout: 8px grid, compact dashboard panels, feather-bar dividers, farmland map strips, low-contrast field surfaces, and readable sensor monitoring workflows.

prompts.label: Transparent kestrel feather motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only one kestrel feather, isolated full object, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: a single authentic kestrel wing feather with rust brown and warm tawny barring, fine dark speckles, slate blue-gray shadowed edge, cream shaft and downy base, crisp feather vanes, natural asymmetry, detailed barbs suitable for a motif cutout.
Composition/framing: centered complete feather with generous padding; do not crop the tip, shaft, or downy base.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves rust brown, slate blue-gray, cream highlights, and delicate feather texture.
Transparent workflow: place the feather on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no bird body, no landscape, no second feather, no shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board for Kestrel
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a motif-driven UI theme named Kestrel, derived from a kestrel feather: rust brown barred feather marks, slate blue-gray wing shadow, cream shaft highlights, farmland-edge straw neutrals, hedgerow charcoal, and pale sky haze.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 high-resolution board, intended final use at 3840x2160. Use a precise product-design grid and large readable labels.
Mood and UI language: light monitoring system for field sensors and observation workflows, calm operational dashboard, alert-light sparing, feather-bar rhythm as dividers, farmland map strips, compact cards with 8px radius, crisp shadcn/tweakcn-style controls.
Required visible sections: title "Kestrel", motif story, palette swatches, typography with English and Japanese examples, left navigation, top navigation, monitoring dashboard metric cards, sensor status list, line chart, bar chart, area chart, small status donut, data table, field inspection form, search/command bar, tabs, buttons, badges, alerts, checkbox/radio/switch controls, loading/empty/error status states, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, CSS token snippets, texture strip, generated asset examples.
Palette: cream background, warm ivory cards, rust brown primary, deep slate blue text and secondary actions, straw beige muted surfaces, hedgerow charcoal borders, pale sky blue accents, amber warning, muted field red destructive only for errors.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs. Labels should be generic monitoring UI labels such as Monitoring, Fields, Sensors, Status, Flight Path, Checkpoint, Table, Analytics, Search, Online, Pending, Alert, Battery, Signal.
Constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no unrelated bright colors, no purple gradients, no illegible microtext, no marketing hero layout.

prompts.label: Dark design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board for Kestrel
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode version of the Kestrel design-system board. It must feel like the same farmland-edge light monitoring system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference style: kestrel feather motif with rust brown barred feather marks, slate blue-gray wing shadow, cream shaft highlights, straw neutrals, hedgerow charcoal, and pale sky blue monitoring accents.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 high-resolution board, intended final use at 3840x2160. Use a precise product-design grid and large readable labels.
Mood and UI language: dark monitoring workspace for field sensors and observation workflows, calm operational dashboard, alert-light sparing, feather-bar rhythm as dividers, farmland map strips, compact cards with 8px radius, crisp shadcn/tweakcn-style controls.
Required visible sections: title "Kestrel Dark", motif story, dark palette swatches, typography with English and Japanese examples, left navigation, top navigation, monitoring dashboard metric cards, sensor status list, line chart, bar chart, area chart, small status donut, data table, field inspection form, search/command bar, tabs, buttons, badges, alerts, checkbox/radio/switch controls, loading/empty/error status states, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, CSS token snippets, texture strip, generated asset examples.
Palette: deep slate blue background, charcoal field panels, cream text, rust brown primary, slate blue-gray secondary, straw beige muted text, warm ivory borders, pale sky blue accent, amber warning, muted field red destructive only for errors.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs. Labels should be generic monitoring UI labels such as Monitoring, Fields, Sensors, Status, Flight Path, Checkpoint, Table, Analytics, Search, Online, Pending, Alert, Battery, Signal.
Constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no neon colors, no pure black flat background, no unrelated bright colors, no purple gradients, no illegible microtext, no marketing hero layout.
